title: Incorrect use of "WHERE x NOT NULL" index for query with a "WHERE x IS NOT ?" term
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t1 (c0 INTEGER, c1 TEXT, c2 DOUBLE);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS i1 ON t1(c0) WHERE c0 IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(NULL, 'test', 3.14);
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'example', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE t1.c0 IS NOT 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect index usage with WHERE x IS NOT ?
